body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-31224", "cvss": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-502", "name": "Deserialization of Untrusted Data"}], "description": "The snorkel library thru v0.10.0 contains an insecure deserialization vulnerability (CWE-502) in the MultitaskClassifier.load() method of the MultitaskClassifier class. The method loads model weight files using torch.load() without enabling the security-restrictive weights_only=True parameter. This default behavior allows the deserialization of arbitrary Python objects via the Pickle module. A remote attacker can exploit this by providing a maliciously crafted model file, leading to arbitrary code execution on the victim's system when the file is loaded via the vulnerable method.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00392, "percentile": 0.31505}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gpx5-7xm4-229w", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-18T20:25:02Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gpx5-7xm4-229w", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gpx5-7xm4-229w"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-31224"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-12T16:16:14Z", "published_at": "2026-05-12T18:30:38Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-31224", "https://github.com/snorkel-team/snorkel", "https://www.notion.so/CVE-2026-31224-35d1e1393188814185f3f6db86c9a4e9", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gpx5-7xm4-229w"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/snorkel-team/snorkel", "summary": "Snorkel MultitaskClassifier.load uses an unsafe torch.load", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-18T20:25:06Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gpx5-7xm4-229w", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "snorkel"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.10.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Snorkel MultitaskClassifier.load uses an unsafe torch.load
